mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_TYPE_NO, BOARD_TYPE_NM, SORT_ORD, USE_YN, REG_DTM FROM BOARD_TYPE WHERE BOARD_TYPE_NO = #{boardTypeNo}

SELECT b.POST_NO AS postNo, b.BOARD_TYPE_NO AS boardTypeNo, bt.BOARD_TYPE_NM AS boardTypeNm, b.REG_EMP_NO AS regEmpNo, e.EMP_NM AS regEmpNm, b.TITLE AS title, b.CN AS cn, b.VIEW_CNT AS viewCnt, b.REG_DTM AS regDtm, b.DEL_YN AS delYn, b.PERIOD_YN AS periodYn, b.START_DTM AS startDtm, b.END_DTM AS endDtm FROM BOARD b LEFT JOIN EMP e ON e.EMP_NO = b.REG_EMP_NO LEFT JOIN BOARD_TYPE bt ON bt.BOARD_TYPE_NO = b.BOARD_TYPE_NO WHERE b.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY b.POST_NO DESC

SELECT b.POST_NO AS postNo, b.BOARD_TYPE_NO AS boardTypeNo, bt.BOARD_TYPE_NM AS boardTypeNm, b.REG_EMP_NO AS regEmpNo, e.EMP_NM AS regEmpNm, b.TITLE AS title, b.CN AS cn, b.VIEW_CNT AS viewCnt, b.REG_DTM AS regDtm, b.DEL_YN AS delYn, b.PERIOD_YN AS periodYn, b.START_DTM AS startDtm, b.END_DTM AS endDtm FROM BOARD b LEFT JOIN EMP e ON e.EMP_NO = b.REG_EMP_NO LEFT JOIN BOARD_TYPE bt ON bt.BOARD_TYPE_NO = b.BOARD_TYPE_NO WHERE b.POST_NO = #{postNo} AND b.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD_POST_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD ( POST_NO, BOARD_TYPE_NO, REG_EMP_NO, TITLE, CN, VIEW_CNT, REG_DTM, DEL_YN, PERIOD_YN, START_DTM, END_DTM ) VALUES ( #{postNo}, #{boardTypeNo}, #{regEmpNo}, #{title}, #{cn}, #{viewCnt}, SYSDATE, 'N', #{periodYn}, #{startDtm}, #{endDtm} )
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET TITLE = #{title}, CN = #{cn}, PERIOD_YN = #{periodYn}, START_DTM = #{startDtm}, END_DTM = #{endDtm}, MOD_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE POST_NO = #{postNo}
UPDATE BOARD SET DEL_YN = 'Y', DEL_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE POST_NO = #{postNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT b.POST_NO AS postNo, b.BOARD_TYPE_NO AS boardTypeNo, bt.BOARD_TYPE_NM AS boardTypeNm, b.REG_EMP_NO AS regEmpNo, e.EMP_NM AS regEmpNm, b.TITLE AS title, b.CN AS cn, b.VIEW_CNT AS viewCnt, b.REG_DTM AS regDtm, b.PERIOD_YN AS periodYn, b.START_DTM AS startDtm, b.END_DTM AS endDtm FROM BOARD b LEFT JOIN EMP e ON e.EMP_NO = b.REG_EMP_NO LEFT JOIN BOARD_TYPE bt ON bt.BOARD_TYPE_NO = b.BOARD_TYPE_NO WHERE b.DEL_YN = 'N' AND b.BOARD_TYPE_NO = #{boardTypeNo}
AND LOWER(e.EMP_NM) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%'
AND LOWER(b.TITLE) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%'
ORDER BY b.POST_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET VIEW_CNT = NVL(VIEW_CNT, 0) + 1 WHERE POST_NO = #{postNo} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD_FILE ( FILE_NO, POST_NO, FILE_NM, SAVE_FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, REG_DTM, DEL_YN ) VALUES ( SEQ_BOARD_FILE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{postNo}, #{fileNm}, #{saveFileNm}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileExt}, SYSDATE, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_NO AS boardFileNo, POST_NO AS postNo, FILE_NM AS fileNm, SAVE_FILE_NM AS saveFileNm, FILE_PATH AS filePath, FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, FILE_EXT AS fileExt, REG_DTM AS regDtm, DEL_YN AS delYn FROM BOARD_FILE WHERE POST_NO = #{postNo} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY FILE_NO DESC

SELECT FILE_NO AS boardFileNo, POST_NO AS postNo, FILE_NM AS fileNm, SAVE_FILE_NM AS saveFileNm, FILE_PATH AS filePath, FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, FILE_EXT AS fileExt, REG_DTM AS regDtm, DEL_YN AS delYn FROM BOARD_FILE WHERE FILE_NO = #{boardFileNo} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
